With numerous bugs having been squashed, graphical quality vastly improved and a number of user complaints tended to. This is the most comprehensive Moonpath experience to date.

Redcap has a big personality and a lot to offer!

FLAGGED AS ESL.

An overhaul of the Bleakwind Basin location.

State.Author: Temryuu - FuzzBeed
State.Description:
Lightweight, vanilla overhaul of the home of beloved Heimskr interior. ESL Flagged.



Another mod in my Revised Edition series, where I return and re-do my older interior mods - this time with a collaborative twist with FuzzBeed.
State.Name: TemBeed Houses - Heimskr's House

State.Description:
I made a number of patches for USMP and some other mods and decided that USMP patches really need their own page.  I will be creating more patches for USMP as time goes by, however due to the sheer number of NPC overhauls, they don't have a high priority. and they will overwrite without issue.

Good for SE/AE

State.Description: Xelzaz is a Custom Fully Voiced Argonian Lawman of House Telvanni with ~6750 lines. He is on his way to Rivenspire in High Rock, having traveled all the way from Port Telvannis in Morrowind. Xelzaz has just arrived in Skyrim and is looking for a traveling companion. In return he will keep you company, cook you warm meals and brew powerful potions.

Easy on eyes.
